title: Executive Order 5309—Withdrawal of Public Lands for Resurvey
text:
Minnesota
Under authority contained in the act of June 25, 1910 (36 Stat. 847), as amended by the act of August 24, 1912 (37 Stat, 497), and subject to the conditions, provisions, and limitations of said acts, it is hereby ordered that the public lands in T. 62 N., R. 2. E. of the fourth principal meridian, Minnesota, be and the same are hereby withdrawn from settlement, location, sale, entry, and all forms of appropriation, pending a resurvey of said township under the act of March 3, 1909 (35 Stat. 845).
This order shall continue in full force and effect unless and until revoked by the President, or by an act of Congress.
HERBERT HOOVER
The White House,
March 24, 1930.
